message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.asarray_chkfinite + numpy.common_type wrappers (br-franken_numpy-9rdu, br-franken_numpy-3di4)

Expose fnp_python.asarray_chkfinite delegating to numpy.asarray_chkfinite
(asarray + non-finite ValueError check) and fnp_python.common_type
delegating to numpy.common_type (common inexact scalar type).

asarray_chkfinite parity covers:
- finite list/ndarray passthrough
- explicit dtype coercion (int->float32)
- NaN input raises parity
- +inf and -inf input raises parity
- integer input is trivially finite

common_type parity covers:
- single float32 → float32
- float32 + float64 → float64
- integer → float64 promotion
- complex input → complex scalar type
- float + complex → complex
- boolean input TypeError parity
